runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - AI Peak Load Semantic Intent Closure
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production /dashboard AI sidebar opened with AI engine status Ready
Natural Korean peak-load query: 지난 24시간 중 가장 부하가 높았던 시간대는 언제야? 근거와 상위 서버도 알려줘.
Compact peak-load query: 24h 기준 load1 peak가 언제였고 어떤 서버가 가장 영향을 줬어?
Clarification prompt did not appear for either whole-fleet peak-load query
Answers included peak time, load/load1 value, and affected server evidence
skippedSurfaces: Full five-question conversational AI QA was not repeated to avoid unnecessary live LLM cost after two focused issue-closure prompts

expertAssessments.rationale: The previously open P1 peak-load phrasing issue was retested on the release-facing v8.11.127 deployment and both representative phrasings returned evidence-grounded answers without clarification blocking.
The live QA scope was intentionally narrow and paired with deterministic unit coverage for the two clarification regressions to avoid unnecessary LLM cost.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after v8.11.127 targeted AI QA; effective 6.7213 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 6090.

completedImprovements.title: Production AI Assistant 24시간 피크 부하 질의가 phrasing-sensitive routing/evidence drift를 보임
completedImprovements.note: Closed on v8.11.127. Both natural Korean and compact 24h/load1/peak whole-fleet queries bypassed clarification and returned metric-grounded peak time plus server evidence.

notes: The first v8.11.125 QA rerun exposed that LLM semantic-frame extraction alone was insufficient for clarification gating; v8.11.126/v8.11.127 added deterministic clarification guards for broad comparison and peak intent queries.
The compact query response came through the deterministic evidence path and included top server evidence: db-mysql-dc1-primary, db-mysql-dc1-replica, api-was-dc1-01.
